description_long: This object is a traditional Japanese katana sword, featuring a long, gently curved, single-edged steel blade with a sharp point. The blade is partially sheathed in a black scabbard, which covers the upper portion and leaves the lower blade exposed. The handle is wrapped in a black material with a visible diamond-pattern grip, providing both comfort and secure handling. A circular brass or gold-colored guard (tsuba) separates the blade from the handle, adding both protection and aesthetic value. The overall design is sleek and functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on utility. The katana is a symbol of craftsmanship and is often associated with martial arts and ceremonial use.
description: A traditional Japanese katana with a curved steel blade, black wrapped handle, and a circular brass guard, partially sheathed in a black scabbard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the katana, with the blade partially exposed and the black scabbard covering the upper portion.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the thin profile of the blade and scabbard, with the circular guard visible at the center.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the blade's curvature, handle wrapping, and scabbard alignment.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the narrowness of the blade and scabbard, with the guard appearing as a circular disc.
attribute_handle_design: straight, cylindrical, black wrapped grip with diamond pattern
